compound_attack_paths.title: Compound: tool_poisoning enables data_exfiltration via planted MCP tool on tool_output
compound_attack_paths.description: compound chain detected (tool_poisoning_data_exfiltration). A poisoned MCP tool definition (hidden instructions in tool description) combined with the same MCP server's elevated trust enables exfiltration of sensitive data through tool output injection. The compound exploit is more severe than either finding alone: the planted tool acts as a covert channel any compatible AI agent will follow. Participating findings: Sensitive marker leaked from tool: search_files, Sensitive marker leaked from tool: read_document, Tool output injection via search_files, Tool output injection via read_document.
